candidate.completion: reroute one of those 'hot singles in your area' directly to my front door.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please reroute one of those 'hot singles in your area' directly to my front door.

evaluation.rationale: The line gets a real laugh from literalizing ad-copy desire into a delivery request, and "reroute" plus "front door" give the pivot some exactness. But it extends the premise more than it cleanly reverses it, and the wording is a bit long and ungainly, which weakens the snap and quotability.
